layers.name: replay_verifiable_payments
layers.purpose: connect payment events to replay evidence

layers.name: economic_failure_reconstruction
layers.purpose: reconstruct failed or disputed machine payments

layers.name: mpc_escalation_layer
layers.purpose: route high-risk economic actions to human approval

rules: small autonomous actions may proceed under policy
large or risky economic actions require escalation
all economic events must be replay-linked
